TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == The Bahamas, Commonwealth of the Bahamas == Pahama a kitakit Takaray a sowal Itiraay i katimol no Amirika, misi'ayaway to Tasiyang a Lukaya kanatanatal a kanatalan a kitakit, mapapolong to 700 ko kanatal (masa'osi ko mamangay a kanatal) ato rakarakaan. O kaitiraan i, ikatimol no sakawali no Fororita rakarakaan a kanatal no Amirika, ika'amisay no Kupa kitakit , ato Isponiawra Kanatal (Tominika kitakit ato Haiti kitakit), isaka'amisay no sawalian no Tokokay kanatanatal , ona kanatal a kitakit sahetoay itiraay i Paymuta Toloay Coco'. . To hatiniay to lafin, ona Toloay a Coco' hananay i, o Toloay Coco' a masacepo'ay Kanatal hananay a mararaw ko pananga. Nawhani, ona pala away ko 'alo nanicoway ira ko cepao'. Matomes to ko kararaw i, oyanan to sanay ko tamdaw. O syoto tatapangan a tokai Naso itiraay i Niw Porowitens Kanatal, o tamdaw nona kitakit sahetoay itini i lawac no Naso syoto a maro'; o pisalaan no lafang ato kakafalican to payso o sakakaay a sapili'etan a demak no Pahama. Rikisi O itiraay i Pahama a kanatanatalan a Yincumin i, o Lukoyang Yincumin, itiya i 1492 miheca saka 10 folad saka 12 romi'ad misakilikilim ci Kolompo to maamaan itini to kanatal a maengeng ningra ko maro'ay tona kanatal a tamdaw. O sowal i, itiya ho macakatay ci Kalompo i Sei Sarwator kanatal sanay. Nikawrira, cakacifaloco' ko Sipangya tona kanatal, 'edeng o pikalop a miala to itiniay a tamdaw a mamalakoli, orasaka, pacekok sato ko karowan no tamdaw. 1648 miheca, ira ko nani Paymuta Toloay Coco' a Ikiris a masafelaway tamdaw pahicera tona kanatal, nikawrira, cowa ka cifaloco' to sakamaro'aw itini, tado hanto no kokong no riyar a pilimekan, o Sipanya a tamdaw i, cilacila a tayni mi'afas to dafong, onini ko sakacaay ka cemahad kona kanatal. Itiya sato i ikor no kalahecian no Amirika a milolol to sapisikedaw, ira ko papinapina to ci'icelay a miti'er to Ikiris a tamdaw milaliw nani Amirika tayni i Pahama Kanatanatalan a milimek, cangra to ko palowaday to sakacakat no Pahama, pamatang a misanga' to pipaloman to takomod a omah. Ikalaloodan no Amirika yo matatoker ko ka'amisay ato kakimolay, ona kanatal o kaheceraan no sapi'eteng to mitakaway a micolo' to maamaan a dafon a tamina. Ikor tono kalahecian no Sakatosa a Lalood no Hekal nga' satapang sanay to ko pisalamaan no lafang a tayal o sakacemahad nona kitakit. 1964 miheca haien no Ikiris ko niyahpikowan no Pahama, 1973 miheca siiked sato a mala Pahama Kitakit. Kicai Itini i taliyok no Cialepi a Riyar o sakakaay ko karahoday no 'orip no Pahama a tamdaw, o lalen a 'etan no polong a ilalomaay a tamdaw o sakakaay itini i Amirikan a , mitooray to Amirika ato Kanata ko kacipayso no Pahama a tamdaw. O pisalaan no lafang ato kakafalican to payso a demak i, o sakakaay a sapili'etan a tayal no Pahama, o padangay to tayal no tamona a demak o sakakaay a tayal itini. Tona mihecahecaan mipasadak ko sifo no Pahama to kasasiromaroma a sapili'etan a faco, sa'icel sa a mitahidang to mamipakafo to payso, sacecay sa ko pisa'icel to sapicemahadaw to misang'ay to kikai ato maohay, ona pisa'icel i, iraay to a maengeng ko kalaheci. Nikawrira, i 2019 miheca saka 9 fola, talikeda to satata'angay a faliyos, onan "Tolian" a faliyos awaay ho nano litengan, orasak masipon to 70 ok no Amirika a payso. 2020 miheca tarikeda to Kofit-Naytin (COVID-19) a lifong, malahedaw ko taniay a misalama a lafang, matongal ko kalahedaw no pili'etanan a tayal. Adihay ko kinairaira no riyar, ira ko kasolin simal, ira ko kaso no palapalaan ato cinah. O kakaomahan a sota' tada manikaway, caay ka hakowa ko kalonanom, orasaka o kinaira no omah cowa ka hakowa. Iraay ko mamamamangay a misang'ay to lalosidan: misakilangay, masang'ay to tamina, misanga'ay to kaka'enen ato nananomen, misanga'ay to 'epah, nakamayaman a tadamaanay dafong, misanga'ay to sapa'iyo. Oninian a misanga'ay to maamaan a dafong i, sahetoay masaopo i etal no naifaloco'ay a malali'acaan. O sapicemahadaw to masamaamaanay a katayalan, pa'icel a somowal ko Pahama a sifo to sapipatireng to ma'edengay a katayan, painien no sifo to sapa'icel a payso. Tadamaforokay a sera ko Pahama, orasaka caay ka nga'ay ko liomah, hato pasamo sanay a paloma to mamang a dateng ato losay, o nipalomaan i, o'edengan o tefos, tomato, pawli, 'alilay, saytaw ato kalitang. O kaka'enen i, sahetoay o mi'acaan nani roma a kitakit, mahaop ko 80%. Ira ko mamang a dateng ato mami' mipasadakan a paliwal, o titi ma'edengay kono niyah a kaka'enen. Onini ko sakapipa'ading no Pahama sifo to liomah ato losay. O riyariyaran no Pahama i, o cecay no tadamaanay a pifotingan no polong a kitakit, o sakakaay a maalaay i, o 'afar no riyar, cekiw, kaciki a foting ato fowa, ilaloma' nonini i, o 'afar no riyar mahaop ko 60% no polong a maalaay nani riyar. Sici O Hontian a kitakit ko Pahama, tosay ko Pikaykian no Kitakit, o sarawa'an no kitakit i, ci Ilicapid II . Ona ci Ilicapid i, o honti no Ikiris, itira sanay i Ikiris ko aro' nira, toro' hananay to ko Conto a mikowakowan to Pahama. Orasak, o Kakeridan no sifo i, o Conto, o tatapangan no sifo i, o congli. Mapatirengay ko sakakaay a pisawkitan, pipacolian a pisawkitan ato i sakowananay a pisawkitan, misawkit to kalofangfang, ano caka laheci ko pisawkit i, o SumiYin no Ikiris to ko mamiketon to sawkit. O kasasiiked a sakowan Itini i pahama ira ko 31 ko kasasilsil no etal, 19 ko kanatal, itini i ngata no Nasaw syoto a Sinpolowisten, Tata'angay a Pahama, Antoros, Apako, Iliwsayla a kanatalan iraay ko misarocoday a matayalay. Tamdaw I 2010 miheca a pisa'osi to tamdaw ira ko 351,461 ko ka'aloman no tamdaw, sahetoay o cilamlamay a teloc no Yoropa ato Afrika a tamdaw. Sahetoay a masaopo i Sinpolowisten kanatal. kaitiraan Itini i 24 15 N, 76 00 W, noNotimolan Amilika ko Bahamas Polong no sekalay i 13,880 sq km "saka 161 ko rayray no ngangan." "O sekalay no sera i, 10,010 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 3,870 sq km" Polong i 327,316 ko tamdaw. siyoto: O Nasaw ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakapito 10 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Ilicapid II , patirengan a romi'ad i 1952 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 6 a romi'ad. Kakayaran O kakayaran no Pahama sahetoay o sa'emelay ato lafa'efaay, o Pihwikuisin mita'eselay i sasifo'an nona kanatanatal. Ano latek ira ko kacifrangan a tata'angay a fali ato faliyos a tayni, 1992 miheca o Antoli a faliyos falesiw han nira ko saka'amisan nona kanatal, 1999 kiheca o Foroito masapeti' nira ko sakawalian nona kanatal, 2019 miheca o Tolian a faliyos palahorac han kopilefek tona kanatal, o cikay no fali cecay a widi ira ko 295 km, o pacekokay a cikay no fali i 354km ko cecay a toki, o iraay ma'osaw i tilid a mirecepay a misiwar to 'orip no Tata'angay a Pahama ato Tata'angay Apako kanatal. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahan a sera i,mahop ko 1.40%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera i, mahaop ko 51.40%, malo no roma to a sera i, mahaop 47.20%.

no~u jo~uro~upa ato~u afrika a tam…¨~…ģaw. sańß…ôto~uaj a masao~upo~u i sinpo~u…ĺo~uwist…ôn kanata…ĺ. kaitiraan itini i ** ** n, ** ** w, no~uno~utimo~u…ĺan ami…ĺika ko~u b~b~vańßamas po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i **,*** s* km "saka *** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan." "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km" po~u…ĺo~uŇč i ***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. sijo~uto~u: o~u nasaw ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakapito~u ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i i…ĺi ¶api…¨~…ģ ii , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. kakajaran o~u kakajaran no~u pańßama sańß…ôto~uaj o~u sa °…ôm…ô…ĺaj ato~u …ĺafa °…ôfaaj, o~u pińßwiko~u~uisin mita °…ôs…ô…ĺaj i sasifo~u °an no~una kanatanata…ĺ. ano~u …ĺat…ôk ira ko~u ka ¶ifraŇčan a tata °aŇčaj a fa…ĺi ato~u fa…ĺijo~us a tajni, **** mińß…ô ¶a o~u anto~u…ĺi a fa…ĺijo~us fa…ĺ…ôsiw ńßan nira ko~u saka °amisan no~una kanata…ĺ, **** kińß…ô ¶a o~u fo~uro~uito~u masap…ôti ° nira ko~u sakawa…ĺian no~una kanata…ĺ, **** mińß…ô ¶a o~u to~u…ĺian a fa…ĺijo~us pa…ĺańßo~ura ¶ ńßan ko~upi…ĺ…ôf…ôk to~una kanata…ĺ, o~u ¶ikaj no~u fa…ĺi ¶…ô ¶aj a wi…¨~…ģi ira ko~u *** km, o~u pa ¶…ôko~ukaj a ¶ikaj no~u fa…ĺi i ***km ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj a to~uki, o~u iraaj ma °o~usaw i ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ a mir…ô ¶…ôpaj a misiwar to~u °o~urip no~u tata °aŇčaj a pańßama ato~u tata °aŇčaj apako~u kanata…ĺ. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańßan a s…ôra i,mańßo~up ko~u *.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra i, mańßao~up ko~u **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra i, mańßao~up **.**%.
S.FORM: == The Bahamas, Commonwealth of the Bahamas == Pahama a kitakit Takaray a sowal Itiraay i katimol no Amirika, misi'ayaway to Tasiyang a Lukaya kanatanatal a kanatalan a kitakit, mapapolong to 700 ko kanatal (masa'osi ko mamangay a kanatal) ato rakarakaan. O kaitiraan i, ikatimol no sakawali no Fororita rakarakaan a kanatal no Amirika, ika'amisay no Kupa kitakit , ato Isponiawra Kanatal (Tominika kitakit ato Haiti kitakit), isaka'amisay no sawalian no Tokokay kanatanatal , ona kanatal a kitakit sahetoay itiraay i Paymuta Toloay Coco'. . To hatiniay to lafin, ona Toloay a Coco' hananay i, o Toloay Coco' a masacepo'ay Kanatal hananay a mararaw ko pananga. Nawhani, ona pala away ko 'alo nanicoway ira ko cepao'. Matomes to ko kararaw i, oyanan to sanay ko tamdaw. O syoto tatapangan a tokai Naso itiraay i Niw Porowitens Kanatal, o tamdaw nona kitakit sahetoay itini i lawac no Naso syoto a maro'; o pisalaan no lafang ato kakafalican to payso o sakakaay a sapili'etan a demak no Pahama. Rikisi O itiraay i Pahama a kanatanatalan a Yincumin i, o Lukoyang Yincumin, itiya i 1492 miheca saka 10 folad saka 12 romi'ad misakilikilim ci Kolompo to maamaan itini to kanatal a maengeng ningra ko maro'ay tona kanatal a tamdaw. O sowal i, itiya ho macakatay ci Kalompo i Sei Sarwator kanatal sanay. Nikawrira, cakacifaloco' ko Sipangya tona kanatal, 'edeng o pikalop a miala to itiniay a tamdaw a mamalakoli, orasaka, pacekok sato ko karowan no tamdaw. 1648 miheca, ira ko nani Paymuta Toloay Coco' a Ikiris a masafelaway tamdaw pahicera tona kanatal, nikawrira, cowa ka cifaloco' to sakamaro'aw itini, tado hanto no kokong no riyar a pilimekan, o Sipanya a tamdaw i, cilacila a tayni mi'afas to dafong, onini ko sakacaay ka cemahad kona kanatal. Itiya sato i ikor no kalahecian no Amirika a milolol to sapisikedaw, ira ko papinapina to ci'icelay a miti'er to Ikiris a tamdaw milaliw nani Amirika tayni i Pahama Kanatanatalan a milimek, cangra to ko palowaday to sakacakat no Pahama, pamatang a misanga' to pipaloman to takomod a omah. Ikalaloodan no Amirika yo matatoker ko ka'amisay ato kakimolay, ona kanatal o kaheceraan no sapi'eteng to mitakaway a micolo' to maamaan a dafon a tamina. Ikor tono kalahecian no Sakatosa a Lalood no Hekal nga' satapang sanay to ko pisalamaan no lafang a tayal o sakacemahad nona kitakit. 1964 miheca haien no Ikiris ko niyahpikowan no Pahama, 1973 miheca siiked sato a mala Pahama Kitakit. Kicai Itini i taliyok no Cialepi a Riyar o sakakaay ko karahoday no 'orip no Pahama a tamdaw, o lalen a 'etan no polong a ilalomaay a tamdaw o sakakaay itini i Amirikan a , mitooray to Amirika ato Kanata ko kacipayso no Pahama a tamdaw. O pisalaan no lafang ato kakafalican to payso a demak i, o sakakaay a sapili'etan a tayal no Pahama, o padangay to tayal no tamona a demak o sakakaay a tayal itini. Tona mihecahecaan mipasadak ko sifo no Pahama to kasasiromaroma a sapili'etan a faco, sa'icel sa a mitahidang to mamipakafo to payso, sacecay sa ko pisa'icel to sapicemahadaw to misang'ay to kikai ato maohay, ona pisa'icel i, iraay to a maengeng ko kalaheci. Nikawrira, i 2019 miheca saka 9 fola, talikeda to satata'angay a faliyos, onan "Tolian" a faliyos awaay ho nano litengan, orasak masipon to 70 ok no Amirika a payso. 2020 miheca tarikeda to Kofit-Naytin (COVID-19) a lifong, malahedaw ko taniay a misalama a lafang, matongal ko kalahedaw no pili'etanan a tayal. Adihay ko kinairaira no riyar, ira ko kasolin simal, ira ko kaso no palapalaan ato cinah. O kakaomahan a sota' tada manikaway, caay ka hakowa ko kalonanom, orasaka o kinaira no omah cowa ka hakowa. Iraay ko mamamamangay a misang'ay to lalosidan: misakilangay, masang'ay to tamina, misanga'ay to kaka'enen ato nananomen, misanga'ay to 'epah, nakamayaman a tadamaanay dafong, misanga'ay to sapa'iyo. Oninian a misanga'ay to maamaan a dafong i, sahetoay masaopo i etal no naifaloco'ay a malali'acaan. O sapicemahadaw to masamaamaanay a katayalan, pa'icel a somowal ko Pahama a sifo to sapipatireng to ma'edengay a katayan, painien no sifo to sapa'icel a payso. Tadamaforokay a sera ko Pahama, orasaka caay ka nga'ay ko liomah, hato pasamo sanay a paloma to mamang a dateng ato losay, o nipalomaan i, o'edengan o tefos, tomato, pawli, 'alilay, saytaw ato kalitang. O kaka'enen i, sahetoay o mi'acaan nani roma a kitakit, mahaop ko 80%. Ira ko mamang a dateng ato mami' mipasadakan a paliwal, o titi ma'edengay kono niyah a kaka'enen. Onini ko sakapipa'ading no Pahama sifo to liomah ato losay. O riyariyaran no Pahama i, o cecay no tadamaanay a pifotingan no polong a kitakit, o sakakaay a maalaay i, o 'afar no riyar, cekiw, kaciki a foting ato fowa, ilaloma' nonini i, o 'afar no riyar mahaop ko 60% no polong a maalaay nani riyar. Sici O Hontian a kitakit ko Pahama, tosay ko Pikaykian no Kitakit, o sarawa'an no kitakit i, ci Ilicapid II . Ona ci Ilicapid i, o honti no Ikiris, itira sanay i Ikiris ko aro' nira, toro' hananay to ko Conto a mikowakowan to Pahama. Orasak, o Kakeridan no sifo i, o Conto, o tatapangan no sifo i, o congli. Mapatirengay ko sakakaay a pisawkitan, pipacolian a pisawkitan ato i sakowananay a pisawkitan, misawkit to kalofangfang, ano caka laheci ko pisawkit i, o SumiYin no Ikiris to ko mamiketon to sawkit. O kasasiiked a sakowan Itini i pahama ira ko 31 ko kasasilsil no etal, 19 ko kanatal, itini i ngata no Nasaw syoto a Sinpolowisten, Tata'angay a Pahama, Antoros, Apako, Iliwsayla a kanatalan iraay ko misarocoday a matayalay. Tamdaw I 2010 miheca a pisa'osi to tamdaw ira ko 351,461 ko ka'aloman no tamdaw, sahetoay o cilamlamay a teloc no Yoropa ato Afrika a tamdaw. Sahetoay a masaopo i Sinpolowisten kanatal. kaitiraan Itini i 24 15 N, 76 00 W, noNotimolan Amilika ko Bahamas Polong no sekalay i 13,880 sq km "saka 161 ko rayray no ngangan." "O sekalay no sera i, 10,010 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 3,870 sq km" Polong i 327,316 ko tamdaw. siyoto: O Nasaw ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakapito 10 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Ilicapid II , patirengan a romi'ad i 1952 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 6 a romi'ad. Kakayaran O kakayaran no Pahama sahetoay o sa'emelay ato lafa'efaay, o Pihwikuisin mita'eselay i sasifo'an nona kanatanatal. Ano latek ira ko kacifrangan a tata'angay a fali ato faliyos a tayni, 1992 miheca o Antoli a faliyos falesiw han nira ko saka'amisan nona kanatal, 1999 kiheca o Foroito masapeti' nira ko sakawalian nona kanatal, 2019 miheca o Tolian a faliyos palahorac han kopilefek tona kanatal, o cikay no fali cecay a widi ira ko 295 km, o pacekokay a cikay no fali i 354km ko cecay a toki, o iraay ma'osaw i tilid a mirecepay a misiwar to 'orip no Tata'angay a Pahama ato Tata'angay Apako kanatal. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahan a sera i,mahop ko 1.40%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera i, mahaop ko 51.40%, malo no roma to a sera i, mahaop 47.20%.
S.PHON: == tńß…ô b~b~vańßamas, ¶o~ummo~unw…ôa…ĺtńß o~uf tńß…ô b~b~vańßamas == pańßama a kitakit takaraj a so~uwa…ĺ itiraaj i katimo~u…ĺ no~u amirika, misi °ajawaj to~u tasijaŇč a …ĺo~u~ukaja kanatanata…ĺ a kanata…ĺan a kitakit, mapapo~u…ĺo~uŇč to~u *** ko~u kanata…ĺ (masa °o~usi ko~u mamaŇčaj a kanata…ĺ) ato~u rakarakaan. o~u kaitiraan i, ikatimo~u…ĺ no~u sakawa…ĺi no~u fo~uro~urita rakarakaan a kanata…ĺ no~u amirika, ika °amisaj no~u ko~u~upa kitakit , ato~u ispo~uniawra kanata…ĺ (to~uminika kitakit ato~u ńßaiti kitakit), isaka °amisaj no~u sawa…ĺian no~u to~uko~ukaj kanatanata…ĺ , o~una kanata…ĺ a kitakit sańß…ôto~uaj itiraaj i pajmo~u~uta to~u…ĺo~uaj ¶o~u ¶o~u °. . to~u ńßatiniaj to~u …ĺafin, o~una to~u…ĺo~uaj a ¶o~u ¶o~u ° ńßananaj i, o~u to~u…ĺo~uaj ¶o~u ¶o~u ° a masa ¶…ôpo~u °aj kanata…ĺ ńßananaj a mararaw ko~u panaŇča. nawńßani, o~una pa…ĺa awaj ko~u °a…ĺo~u nani ¶o~uwaj ira ko~u ¶…ôpao~u °. mato~um…ôs to~u ko~u kararaw i, o~ujanan to~u sanaj ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sjo~uto~u tatapaŇčan a to~ukai naso~u itiraaj i niw po~uro~uwit…ôns kanata…ĺ, o~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~una kitakit sańß…ôto~uaj itini i …ĺawa ¶ no~u naso~u sjo~uto~u a maro~u °; o~u pisa…ĺaan no~u …ĺafaŇč ato~u kakafa…ĺi ¶an to~u pajso~u o~u sakakaaj a sapi…ĺi °…ôtan a …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u pańßama. rikisi o~u itiraaj i pańßama a kanatanata…ĺan a jin ¶o~u~umin i, o~u …ĺo~u~uko~ujaŇč jin ¶o~u~umin, itija i **** mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ misaki…ĺiki…ĺim ¶i ko~u…ĺo~umpo~u to~u maamaan itini to~u kanata…ĺ a ma…ôŇč…ôŇč niŇčra ko~u maro~u °aj to~una kanata…ĺ a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u so~uwa…ĺ i, itija ńßo~u ma ¶akataj ¶i ka…ĺo~umpo~u i s…ôi sarwato~ur kanata…ĺ sanaj. nikawrira, ¶aka ¶ifa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ko~u sipaŇčja to~una kanata…ĺ, °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u pika…ĺo~up a mia…ĺa to~u itiniaj a tam…¨~…ģaw a mama…ĺako~u…ĺi, o~urasaka, pa ¶…ôko~uk sato~u ko~u karo~uwan no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **** mińß…ô ¶a, ira ko~u nani pajmo~u~uta to~u…ĺo~uaj ¶o~u ¶o~u ° a ikiris a masaf…ô…ĺawaj tam…¨~…ģaw pańßi ¶…ôra to~una kanata…ĺ, nikawrira, ¶o~uwa ka ¶ifa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° to~u sakamaro~u °aw itini, ta…¨~…ģo~u ńßanto~u no~u ko~uko~uŇč no~u rijar a pi…ĺim…ôkan, o~u sipanja a tam…¨~…ģaw i, ¶i…ĺa ¶i…ĺa a tajni mi °afas to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč, o~unini ko~u saka ¶aaj ka ¶…ômańßa…¨~…ģ ko~una kanata…ĺ. itija sato~u i iko~ur no~u ka…ĺańß…ô ¶ian no~u amirika a mi…ĺo~u…ĺo~u…ĺ to~u sapisik…ô…¨~…ģaw, ira ko~u papinapina to~u ¶i °i ¶…ô…ĺaj a miti °…ôr to~u ikiris a tam…¨~…ģaw mi…ĺa…ĺiw nani amirika tajni i pańßama kanatanata…ĺan a mi…ĺim…ôk, ¶aŇčra to~u ko~u pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģaj to~u saka ¶akat no~u pańßama, pamataŇč a misaŇča ° to~u pipa…ĺo~uman to~u tako~umo~u…¨~…ģ a o~umańß. ika…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan no~u amirika jo~u matato~uk…ôr ko~u ka °amisaj ato~u kakimo~u…ĺaj, o~una kanata…ĺ o~u kańß…ô ¶…ôraan no~u sapi °…ôt…ôŇč to~u mitakawaj a mi ¶o~u…ĺo~u ° to~u maamaan a …¨~…ģafo~un a tamina. iko~ur to~uno~u ka…ĺańß…ô ¶ian no~u sakato~usa a …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ Ňča ° satapaŇč sanaj to~u ko~u pisa…ĺamaan no~u …ĺafaŇč a taja…ĺ o~u saka ¶…ômańßa…¨~…ģ no~una kitakit. **** mińß…ô ¶a ńßai…ôn no~u ikiris ko~u nijańßpiko~uwan no~u pańßama, **** mińß…ô ¶a siik…ô…¨~…ģ sato~u a ma…ĺa pańßama kitakit. ki ¶ai itini i ta…ĺijo~uk no~u ¶ia…ĺ…ôpi a rijar o~u sakakaaj ko~u karańßo~u…¨~…ģaj no~u °o~urip no~u pańßama a tam…¨~…ģaw, o~u …ĺa…ĺ…ôn a °…ôtan no~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč a i…ĺa…ĺo~umaaj a tam…¨~…ģaw o~u sakakaaj itini i amirikan a , mito~uo~uraj to~u amirika ato~u kanata ko~u ka ¶ipajso~u no~u pańßama a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pisa…ĺaan no~u …ĺafaŇč ato~u kakafa…ĺi ¶an to~u pajso~u a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, o~u sakakaaj a sapi…ĺi °…ôtan a taja…ĺ no~u pańßama, o~u pa…¨~…ģaŇčaj to~u taja…ĺ no~u tamo~una a …¨~…ģ…ômak o~u sakakaaj a taja…ĺ itini. to~una mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan mipasa…¨~…ģak ko~u sifo~u no~u pańßama to~u kasasiro~umaro~uma a sapi…ĺi °…ôtan a fa ¶o~u, sa °i ¶…ô…ĺ sa a mitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u mamipakafo~u to~u pajso~u, sa ¶…ô ¶aj sa ko~u pisa °i ¶…ô…ĺ to~u sapi ¶…ômańßa…¨~…ģaw to~u misaŇč °aj to~u kikai ato~u mao~uńßaj, o~una pisa °i ¶…ô…ĺ i, iraaj to~u a ma…ôŇč…ôŇč ko~u ka…ĺańß…ô ¶i. nikawrira, i **** mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa, ta…ĺik…ô…¨~…ģa to~u satata °aŇčaj a fa…ĺijo~us, o~unan "to~u…ĺian" a fa…ĺijo~us awaaj ńßo~u nano~u …ĺit…ôŇčan, o~urasak masipo~un to~u ** o~uk no~u amirika a pajso~u. **** mińß…ô ¶a tarik…ô…¨~…ģa to~u ko~ufit-najtin ( ¶o~ub~vi…¨~…ģ-**) a …ĺifo~uŇč, ma…ĺańß…ô…¨~…ģaw ko~u taniaj a misa…ĺama a …ĺafaŇč, mato~uŇča…ĺ ko~u ka…ĺańß…ô…¨~…ģaw no~u pi…ĺi °…ôtanan a taja…ĺ. a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u kinairaira no~u rijar, ira ko~u kaso~u…ĺin sima…ĺ, ira ko~u kaso~u no~u pa…ĺapa…ĺaan ato~u ¶inańß. o~u kakao~umańßan a so~uta ° ta…¨~…ģa manikawaj, ¶aaj ka ńßako~uwa ko~u ka…ĺo~unano~um, o~urasaka o~u kinaira no~u o~umańß ¶o~uwa ka ńßako~uwa. iraaj ko~u mamamamaŇčaj a misaŇč °aj to~u …ĺa…ĺo~usi…¨~…ģan: misaki…ĺaŇčaj, masaŇč °aj to~u tamina, misaŇča °aj to~u kaka °…ôn…ôn ato~u nanano~um…ôn, misaŇča °aj to~u °…ôpańß, nakamajaman a ta…¨~…ģamaanaj …¨~…ģafo~uŇč, misaŇča °aj to~u sapa °ijo~u. o~uninian a misaŇča °aj to~u maamaan a …¨~…ģafo~uŇč i, sańß…ôto~uaj masao~upo~u i …ôta…ĺ no~u naifa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °aj a ma…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶aan. o~u sapi ¶…ômańßa…¨~…ģaw to~u masamaamaanaj a kataja…ĺan, pa °i ¶…ô…ĺ a so~umo~uwa…ĺ ko~u pańßama a sifo~u to~u sapipatir…ôŇč to~u ma °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇčaj a katajan, paini…ôn no~u sifo~u to~u sapa °i ¶…ô…ĺ a pajso~u. ta…¨~…ģamafo~uro~ukaj a s…ôra ko~u pańßama, o~urasaka ¶aaj ka Ňča °aj ko~u …ĺio~umańß, ńßato~u pasamo~u sanaj a pa…ĺo~uma to~u mamaŇč a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ato~u …ĺo~usaj, o~u nipa…ĺo~umaan i, o~u °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan o~u t…ôfo~us, to~umato~u, paw…ĺi, °a…ĺi…ĺaj, sajtaw ato~u ka…ĺitaŇč. o~u kaka °…ôn…ôn i, sańß…ôto~uaj o~u mi °a ¶aan nani ro~uma a kitakit, mańßao~up ko~u **%. ira ko~u mamaŇč a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ato~u mami ° mipasa…¨~…ģakan a pa…ĺiwa…ĺ, o~u titi ma °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇčaj ko~uno~u nijańß a kaka °…ôn…ôn. o~unini ko~u sakapipa °a…¨~…ģiŇč no~u pańßama sifo~u to~u …ĺio~umańß ato~u …ĺo~usaj. o~u rijarijaran no~u pańßama i, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj no~u ta…¨~…ģamaanaj a pifo~utiŇčan no~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč a kitakit, o~u sakakaaj a maa…ĺaaj i, o~u °afar no~u rijar, ¶…ôkiw, ka ¶iki a fo~utiŇč ato~u fo~uwa, i…ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~unini i, o~u °afar no~u rijar mańßao~up ko~u **% no~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč a maa…ĺaaj nani rijar. si ¶i o~u ńßo~untian a kitakit ko~u pańßama, to~usaj ko~u pikajkian no~u kitakit, o~u sarawa °an no~u kitakit i, ¶i i…ĺi ¶api…¨~…ģ ii . o~una ¶i i…ĺi ¶api…¨~…ģ i, o~u ńßo~unti no~u ikiris, itira sanaj i ikiris ko~u aro~u ° nira, to~uro~u ° ńßananaj to~u ko~u ¶o~unto~u a miko~uwako~uwan to~u iraaj ko~u misaro~u ¶o~u…¨~…ģaj a mataja…ĺaj. tam…¨~…ģaw i **** mińß…ô ¶a a pisa °o~usi to~u tam…¨~…ģaw ira ko~u ***,*** ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, sańß…ôto~uaj o~u ¶i…ĺam…ĺamaj a t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ s…ôka…ĺaj i **,*** s* km "saka *** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan." "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km" po~u…ĺo~uŇč i ***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. sijo~uto~u: o~u nasaw ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakapito~u ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i i…ĺi ¶api…¨~…ģ ii , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. kakajaran o~u kakajaran no~u pańßama sańß…ôto~uaj o~u sa °…ôm…ô…ĺaj ato~u …ĺafa °…ôfaaj, o~u pińßwiko~u~uisin mita °…ôs…ô…ĺaj i sasifo~u °an no~una kanatanata…ĺ. ano~u …ĺat…ôk ira ko~u ka ¶ifraŇčan a tata °aŇčaj a fa…ĺi ato~u fa…ĺijo~us a tajni, **** mińß…ô ¶a o~u anto~u…ĺi a fa…ĺijo~us fa…ĺ…ôsiw ńßan nira ko~u saka °amisan no~una kanata…ĺ, **** kińß…ô ¶a o~u fo~uro~uito~u masap…ôti ° nira ko~u sakawa…ĺian no~una kanata…ĺ, **** mińß…ô ¶a o~u to~u…ĺian a fa…ĺijo~us pa…ĺańßo~ura ¶ ńßan ko~upi…ĺ…ôf…ôk to~una kanata…ĺ, o~u ¶ikaj no~u fa…ĺi ¶…ô ¶aj a wi…¨~…ģi ira ko~u *** km, o~u pa ¶…ôko~ukaj a ¶ikaj no~u fa…ĺi i ***km ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj a to~uki, o~u iraaj ma °o~usaw i ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ a mir…ô ¶…ôpaj a misiwar to~u °o~urip no~u tata °aŇčaj a pańßama ato~u tata °aŇčaj apako~u kanata…ĺ. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańßan a s…ôra i,mańßo~up ko~u *.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra i, mańßao~up ko~u **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra i, mańßao~up **.**%.
